item.title: Micro-frontend with Cloudflare ESI
item.description: Explores ESI for dynamic injection of header and footer (as microfrontent) in a microsite architecture implemented with SSG

item.title: Using Sever-Side GTM
item.description: Instead of dumping all those scripts on the user's browser, move them to a server container

item.title: Implementing Rollback in SSG with Cloudfront
item.description: Since entire site is pre-rendered, difference in layout between mobile/desktop causes higher CLS.

item.title: Improving CLS
item.description: Since entire site is pre-rendered, difference in layout between mobile/desktop causes higher CLS.

item.title: Optimizing Content Delivery by Serving Pre-compressed content
item.description: Serving Pre-compressed content from CDN

item.title: Implementing Redirections for Static Sites
item.description: This blogs talks about handling redirects in Static Sites

item.title: Static Site Generation (SSG)
item.description: Implementing different features and optimizations

item.title: Enhancing E-commerce Image Service Availability
item.description: Create a backup of all the images and its common variant in S3, and use it as a fallback origin to increase the overall availability of the system

item.title: Streamlining Infra Costs with Responsive Images
item.description: Using responsive images powered by a image transofrormation service on a site with high traffic, results in high cost. We saved around 70% by using just a CDN in front!

item.title: Unveiling NGINX's Proxy Cache Lock for SSR-Generated Content
item.description: Saves compute cost by significantly reducing origin server load

item.title: Switching HTTP Versions on browser
item.description: How and when browser decides to switch HTTP Versions

item.title: How Things Works!
item.description: We talk about internals - Browser, DNS, V8 and more

item.title: Optmizing Critical Rendering Path
item.description: Browser Optimizations and custom optimizations to improve the CRP

item.title: Analysing CRP
item.description: Analysing request and rendering flow for differnt setups

item.title: Layout And Paint
item.description: DOM + CSSOM = Render Tree

item.title: Render tree construction
item.description: DOM + CSSOM = Render Tree

item.title: Script Execution
item.description: When are your scripts executed? How to control the order of execution? Let us explore all these.

item.title: CSSOM Construction
item.description: Bytes → characters → tokens → nodes → CSSOM

item.title: DOM Construction
item.description: Bytes → characters → tokens → nodes → DOM

item.title: Critical Rendering Path
item.description: The critical rendering path refers to the steps involved until the web page starts rendering in the browser.

item.title: LRU Implementation
item.description: Implement a in-memory cache in JS with LRU as cache-eviction policy

item.title: Length of a string
item.description: What you see is not always what you get!. The length of "👩‍👩‍👦‍👦🌦️🧘🏻‍♂️" is 21. Let us explore why is it 21 and how to get 3.

item.title: JS Interview Questions
item.description: Tricky questions and related tips and tricks

item.title: Better Error Handling in JavaScript / Typescript
item.description: Making errors as first-class citizens in your async function response, inspired by Go.

item.description: Publisher Subscriber Pattern for decoupling

item.title: Javascript Patterns
item.description: Common JS Patterns used in general
